highlights: Built agentic contract intelligence platform on Google Cloud using Document AI, Cloud Storage, and Vertex AI, extracting reimbursement terms, obligations, and SLAs from payer-provider contracts.
Orchestrated multi-agent systems using Google ADK with A2A communication and MCP tool integration, enabling scalable parsing, reasoning, and retrieval workflows.
Designed RAG architecture with hybrid retrieval over Neo4j knowledge graph and Vertex AI embeddings, improving clause-level search relevance and contextual grounding.
Modeled domain ontologies and implemented a Neo4j knowledge graph with node-level embeddings to capture contract entities, relationships, and semantic context.
Developed conversational and retrieval agents supporting multi-turn reasoning and grounded responses across enterprise legal datasets.
Leveraged Gemini 3.1 Pro for long-context reasoning, Gemini Flash for low-latency inference, and Text2SQL pipelines for natural language to structured query generation.
Implemented prompt chaining, intent-aware routing, and planning pipelines to dynamically select agents, tools, and retrieval strategies based on task context.
Built evaluation and monitoring pipelines using DeepEval, Langfuse, and Promptfoo with CI/CD integration, ensuring output quality and traceability.
Deployed containerized FastAPI services using Docker on Cloud Run and GKE, enabling scalable, low-latency inference.
Collaborated on fine-tuning workflows using customer support logs to improve classification of contract issues and enhance downstream agent accuracy.
Developed classification pipelines for customer interaction data, enabling automated detection and categorization of contract disputes.
Built user-facing interfaces using lovable.dev for conversational querying, contract exploration, and analytics visualization.
Built ScreenIQ, a recruiter copilot agent using LangGraph and LangChain, orchestrating multi-node decision workflows for candidate screening, ranking, and hiring recommendations.
Designed a modular three-layer architecture (Data, Retrieval/Ranking, Reasoning) enabling scalable agent pipelines with MCP tool integration and semantic guardrails.
Implemented LLM-driven intent and task parsing using Claude 3.5 Sonnet on Amazon Bedrock, decomposing recruiter queries into structured actions for search and evaluation.
Developed hybrid retrieval pipelines using Milvus, combining dense embeddings from Sentence Transformers with keyword search and Cross-Encoder reranking.
Engineered vector storage in Milvus with specialized indexes for resumes, skills, and recruiter interactions to enable high-recall candidate matching.
Built automated ingestion and parsing pipelines using Unstructured.io and Docling, generating normalized candidate profiles with structured schema extraction.
Created an interaction memory layer capturing recruiter feedback and hiring signals, enabling feedback-aware retrieval and ranking.
Implemented candidate ranking pipelines using embedding similarity, feature scoring, and Cross-Encoder reranking models.
Developed evaluation pipelines using Ragas and BERTScore, measuring retriever performance and validating generation quality.
Built skill gap analysis using semantic comparison between candidate embeddings and job descriptions to identify missing skills and risk areas.
Generated role-specific interview questions using LLM prompting, aligned to candidate gaps and job requirements.
Designed reasoning nodes that synthesize retrieval outputs and historical signals to produce evidence-backed hiring recommendations and confidence scores.
Integrated guardrails and bias checks within evaluation pipelines to ensure fair and consistent candidate assessment.
Delivered structured recruiter insights including strengths, gaps, and risk flags through agent-driven outputs.
Deployed scalable backend services using FastAPI on AWS (EKS, Lambda, API Gateway) with a React-based UI for recruiter interaction.
Engineered and maintained automated CI/CD pipelines for machine learning workflows using Jenkins and GitHub Actions, enabling seamless model testing, linting, and deployment.
Containerized complex machine learning models and data processing pipelines using Docker, ensuring environment parity between local development and scalable production deployments.
Implemented comprehensive ML experiment tracking, hyperparameter logging, and model versioning using MLflow, establishing a culture of reproducible model development.
Architected robust data validation and reconciliation frameworks to ensure strict parity and data integrity when migrating pipelines from legacy on-premise stores to Databricks.
Developed automated monitoring scripts to continuously track data distributions, detecting inference data drift and performance degradation to trigger automated retraining.
Streamlined local development environments by standardizing configuration scripts using Zsh and Visual Studio Code, significantly accelerating engineering onboarding.
Developed Infrastructure as Code (IaC) scripts using Terraform to provision and manage reproducible cloud resources, ensuring consistent environment setup across development, staging, and production.
Implemented automated unit and integration testing for ML pipelines using Pytest, validating data schemas and model input/output shapes to prevent breaking changes in the production registry.

Engineered custom predictive features and managed complex missing data imputations using Pandas and NumPy, conducting thorough Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to reduce noise and establish robust baseline models.

Developed robust machine learning classification models for predictive analytics tasks using Scikit-learn and Python, experimenting heavily with ensemble methods such as Bagging and Random Forest classifiers.
Evaluated model splits and feature importance by analyzing statistical metrics including Entropy and Gini Impurity to optimize decision tree performance on highly imbalanced datasets.
Built and documented scalable REST APIs using FastAPI to securely serve machine learning model predictions to downstream internal dashboards.
Authored comprehensive technical documentation and interactive API specifications using Swagger UI, facilitating seamless and rapid integration for frontend development teams.

Implemented rigorous model validation strategies using K-Fold Cross-Validation and Stratified Sampling, utilizing Precision-Recall curves and F1-Score metrics to ensure model reliability on skewed real-world data.

skills.details: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, HuggingFace, spaCy, Pandas, NumPy, Ensemble Methods, Fine-tuning

skills.details: GraphRAG, Neo4j (Cypher), Hybrid Retrieval, Semantic Chunking, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Docling, Unstructured.io

skills.details: Milvus, FAISS, Pinecone, ChromaDB, Redis, DuckDB

skills.details: DeepEval, Langfuse, Promptfoo, Ragas, BERTScore, LLM-as-Judge, Guardrails, Data Drift Detection
